title: Volunteers Needed for the EJSE #8 (Junior Squash)
excerpt: Want to help out with the next generation of Edmonton squash players? There are a number of open volunteer slots we are looking to fill for the Edmonton Junior Squash Event on Sunday, October 29th. Shifts are for between 2.5 and 3 hours, with start times from 8 AM to 1 PM. Please contact Julie … Read more
content: Want to help out with the next generation of Edmonton squash players? There are a number of open volunteer slots we are looking to fill for the Edmonton Junior Squash Event on Sunday, October 29th. Shifts are for between 2.5 and 3 hours, with start times from 8 AM to 1 PM. Please contact Julie Multamaki for details @ edmontonjrsquashevents@gmail.com
